Check for hyperedge-based logical and functional dependencies in file 'ticdata2000_preprocessed.csv'

----------------------------------------------------
Data                  | ticdata2000_preprocessed.csv
Hyperedge file        | tic_hyperedges_top_10.csv   
No. of rows           | 5220                        
No. of columns        | 86                          
No. of hyperedges     | 67                          
No. of LD occurrences | 3347                        
No. of unique LDs     | 1876                        
No. of FD occurrences | 73                          
No. of unique FDs     | 38                          
----------------------------------------------------


Logical dependency interpretation
----------------------------------------
Condition | Implication               
--------------------------------------
Q = 0     | Functional dependency (FD)
0 < Q < 1 | Logical dependency (LD)   
Q = 1     | No dependency             
Lower Q   | Stronger dependency       
--------------------------------------

Note: Functional dependencies are a special case of logical dependencies.


##################################################

========================================
Functional Dependencies (FDs)
========================================

Layer 1 (2 dependencies)
----------------------------------------
{ "Contribution Surfboard Policies" } -> { "Number of Surfboard Policies" }
{ "Customer Subtype" } -> { "Customer Main Type" }

Layer 2 (3 dependencies)
----------------------------------------
{ "Contribution Lorry Policies", "Customer Subtype" } -> { "Number of Lorry Policies" }
{ "Customer Main Type", "Number of Surfboard Policies" } -> { "Contribution Surfboard Policies" }
{ "Customer Subtype", "Number of Surfboard Policies" } -> { "Contribution Surfboard Policies" }

Layer 3 (4 dependencies)
----------------------------------------
{ "Contribution Agricultural Machine Policies", "Contribution Lorry Policies", "Customer Main Type" } -> { "Number of Lorry Policies" }
{ "Contribution Disability Insurance Policies", "Customer Main Type", "Number of Lorry Policies" } -> { "Contribution Lorry Policies" }
{ "Contribution Disability Insurance Policies", "Customer Subtype", "Number of Lorry Policies" } -> { "Contribution Lorry Policies" }
